posts.author: Kjustus-walsh (Kimberly Justus-Walsh)
posts.cookedHtml:
I love using the Conversation piece within Subitems. One of my favorites is Emails & Activities to track meeting notes. Is there a way for the conversation bubble to indicate a Email & Activities has been added.

For example looking at this screenshot:
Line 1 Live Feb 16 has notes under Updates.
Line 2 has notes under a Meeting Recap in Emails and Activites. I would like to see that 1 for line 2 as well so I know there is something included.
